description: Out of the box dashboard for Azure Blob Storage.
title: Azure Blob Storage Overview

500d9daf-d3ab-4bec-bff7-2e716c389958.description: Subscription ID for your Azure Account
500d9daf-d3ab-4bec-bff7-2e716c389958.name: azuremonitor.subscription_id

widgets.description: The amount of storage used by the storage account's Blob service in bytes.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Blob Capacity

widgets.description: The number of blob objects stored in the storage account.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Blob Count

widgets.description: The number of containers in the storage account.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Blob Container Count

widgets.description: The percentage of availability for the storage service or the specified API operation.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Availability

widgets.description: The amount of egress data. This number includes egress to external client from Azure Storage as well as egress within Azure. As a result, this number does not reflect billable egress.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Egress

widgets.description: The amount of ingress data, in bytes. This number includes ingress from an external client into Azure Storage as well as ingress within Azure.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Ingress

widgets.description: The average end-to-end latency of successful requests made to a storage service or the specified API operation, in milliseconds. This value includes the required processing time within Azure Storage to read the request, send the response, and receive acknowledgment of the response.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Success E2E Latency

widgets.description: The average time used to process a successful request by Azure Storage. This value does not include the network latency specified in SuccessE2ELatency.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Success Server Latency

widgets.description: The number of requests made to a storage service or the specified API operation. This number includes successful and failed requests, as well as requests which produced errors. Use ResponseType dimension for the number of different type of response.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $storageaccount  AND type = 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices'

widgets.title: Transactions
